name: SSH Brute Force Attack Detection
description: Detects multiple failed SSH login attempts from the same source IP address within a short time window, indicating a potential brute-force attack.
author: Security Team

params.subject: CRITICAL: SSH Brute Force Attack Detected

note:
## Investigation Guide

1. Check if the source IP is known to threat intelligence feeds
2. Review all login attempts (both failed and successful) from this IP
3. Verify if any successful logins occurred after the brute-force attempts
4. Check for any suspicious activity from accounts that were targeted
5. Review firewall logs for other activity from this source IP
6. Consider blocking the IP at the firewall level
7. If internal IP, investigate the compromised host

## Response Actions

- [ ] Block source IP at firewall
- [ ] Review all accounts targeted for compromise
- [ ] Force password reset for targeted accounts
- [ ] Enable 2FA if not already enabled
- [ ] Review SSH configuration for hardening opportunities
- [ ] Check for successful logins from this IP in the past 30 days
